steps.title: Use the zeros
steps.content:
The graph has zeros at $x=7$ and $x=-2$, so the quadratic can be written in factored form.
$$f(x)=a(x-7)(x+2)$$

steps.title: Find the coefficient sum
steps.content:
Expand the factors to identify $b$.
$$f(x)=a(x^2-5x-14)=ax^2-5ax-14a$$
So $b=-5a$, and
$$a+b=a-5a=-4a$$

steps.title: Choose a possible value
steps.content:
Since $a$ is an integer greater than $1$, $a=2$ is allowed.
$$-4a=-4(2)=-8$$
The answer is A.
